headline: NiSource Gains From Rising Data Center Demand & Strategic Investment
summary: NI rides on rising data center demand and rate hikes while driving cost savings and $28B investments, but aging infrastructure and delays pose risks.

headline: Consumers Energy Tells State Commission: Sale of 13 Hydroelectric Dams Is Best Option for Michigan
summary: Consumers Energy officials told a state commission today that selling 13 hydroelectric dams remains the best option for Michigan, supporting local communities and offering the lowest long-term cost for customers.

raw.headline: Consumers Energy Tells State Commission: Sale of 13 Hydroelectric Dams Is Best Option for Michigan

headline: Barclays Maintains Overweight on CMS Energy, Raises Price Target to $81
summary: Barclays  analyst Nicholas Campanella   maintains CMS Energy (NYSE:CMS) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $79 to $81.
